description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On February 1st (Sunday), I attended the opening ceremony of the 50th Kaji Table Tennis Tournament, held at the Hanno Civic Gymnasium Main Arena.

This tournament aims to promote sports among local residents and build fitness and community bonds. It is a tournament with history and tradition, reaching its 50th edition this year.

I would like to extend my thanks to all those who worked so hard to make this event possible.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202602/13115.html
